component_instructions.hero: Use a full-screen or 90vh section. Background image with `bg-gradient-to-r from-[#0F2E22]/80 to-transparent` overlay. Left-aligned typography for an editorial feel. Include two buttons: Primary (Orange) 'Explore Packages' and Secondary (Glassmorphism) 'Rent a Car'.
component_instructions.destination_bento: Use CSS Grid (12 cols). Span Darjeeling as the large hero cell, Gangtok as tall vertical, and Monasteries/Lakes as smaller squares. Implement hover zoom on images. Avoid equal squares. Text overlays should use gradient scrims for readability.
component_instructions.packages_cards: Use pure Tailwind for clean cards. No standard borders, use a subtle shadow. Image on top, details below. The CTA button inside the card should be the deep blue `#1E3A5F`.
component_instructions.fleet_showcase: Dark background section (`bg-[#0F2E22]`). Showcase cars using glassmorphism cards (`bg-white/5` with `backdrop-blur-xl`). White text.
component_instructions.contact_form: Shadcn UI Input and Textarea. Remove the default heavy border and add an underline or very light border to make it look premium. Highlight focus states with the brand orange.
component_instructions.floating_whatsapp: Fixed position bottom-right. Green background (`#25D366`), white icon. Continuous pulse animation. `z-50`.

testing_requirements: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid. Examples: `data-testid='nav-destinations'`, `data-testid='hero-cta-explore'`, `data-testid='whatsapp-floating-button'`.
